description:
## [1.0.2](https://github.com/joganubaid/cryptomator-morphe-patches/compare/v1.0.1...v1.0.2) (2026-05-04)


### Bug Fixes

* add compatibility config for patches ([510e7e0](https://github.com/joganubaid/cryptomator-morphe-patches/commit/510e7e0a3f6923a9f630f527c8a996346703bf1c))
* add explicit type to empty setOf in Compatibility ([54136a9](https://github.com/joganubaid/cryptomator-morphe-patches/commit/54136a9439b3e43f39c36e1789a8af162a32836f))
* add stub dependency to patches build ([aff50d8](https://github.com/joganubaid/cryptomator-morphe-patches/commit/aff50d86dd70d3ce43232477394f1a027e7212b6))
* update plugin version to 1.3.2 and add stub project ([1de79f3](https://github.com/joganubaid/cryptomator-morphe-patches/commit/1de79f3f56c235612b6fee3e0d93962962256571))
* update workflow to use Java 21 and let semantic-release handle build ([61162de](https://github.com/joganubaid/cryptomator-morphe-patches/commit/61162de6c90d50a66fe56778b589c49f66754077))
* use placeholder signature instead of empty set ([d6d0e4c](https://github.com/joganubaid/cryptomator-morphe-patches/commit/d6d0e4cce1a4e0eeb235bcfbe779ca82e6231646))
* use string for appIconColor ([0468e27](https://github.com/joganubaid/cryptomator-morphe-patches/commit/0468e278c24d7c7538d75a189d2c4da3375d0a64))
